summary: Comprehensive testing of Sonel MPI-530 Interactive Guide application - ALL features working perfectly. Backend 28/28 tests passed, Frontend 100% success. App is in Polish, uses official Sonel CDN images, and includes all 6 professional features (Cable Calculator, Safety Checklist, PDF Generator, Quiz, Notes). No '[object Object]' runtime errors found - service worker fix confirmed working.
passed_tests: Backend: Root API returns version info
Backend: /api/functions returns 10 measurement functions (RCD, Loop, Insulation, Earthing, Voltage, Continuity, Phase Sequence, Motor Rotation, Lux, Earthing Clamp)
Backend: All functions have required fields and are in Polish
Backend: /api/tools/calculator?zs=0.45&voltage=230 returns Ik=511.1A with recommendations
Backend: /api/tools/cable-calculator?power_kw=3.5 returns recommended section 1.5mm²
Backend: /api/tools/checklists returns 6 safety checklists with items
Backend: /api/quiz/questions returns 15 questions with 4 options each
Backend: /api/quiz/check correctly validates answers
Backend: /api/tools/norms returns Zs tables, insulation, RCD times, lighting norms
Backend: /api/tools/error-codes returns error code explanations
Backend: /api/tools/diagrams returns connection diagrams
Backend: /api/protocols/guides returns 4 protocol guides
Backend: /api/protocols/templates returns 5 protocol templates
Backend: /api/protocols/examples returns 5 example protocols with measurements
Backend: /api/search returns results for 'RCD' and Polish queries
Backend: /api/images returns 10+ official Sonel CDN images
Backend: /api/faq returns FAQ items
Frontend: Home page loads with all 10 measurement function cards
Frontend: Search functionality works - typing 'RCD' returns results
Frontend: Clicking on RCD function opens detailed step-by-step guide
Frontend: LCD display shows expected results with Polish labels
Frontend: Safety notes section displays properly
Frontend: Step navigation (Previous/Next) works correctly
Frontend: Back button returns to home page
Frontend: Tools section accessible via 'Otwórz narzędzia' button
Frontend: Tools has 9 tabs: Kalkulator Zs, Dobór przewodu, Tabele norm, Kody błędów, Schematy, Checklista, Generator PDF, Quiz, Notatki
Frontend: Zs Calculator works - enter 0.45Ω, calculates Ik=511.1A
Frontend: Cable Calculator works - enter 3.5kW, shows 1.5mm² recommendation
Frontend: Safety Checklist shows 6 checklists with clickable checkboxes
Frontend: Quiz shows 15 questions, 'Rozpocznij quiz' button works
Frontend: Notes feature works - add/display notes with localStorage
Frontend: Protocols section accessible via 'Zobacz instrukcje' button
Frontend: Protocols view shows 4 guides + 5 example protocols
Frontend: Dark mode toggle works correctly
Frontend: No '[object Object]' runtime errors found
seed_data_creation: All data is MOCKED/hardcoded in server.py - no database used
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. App is a Polish interactive guide for Sonel MPI-530 electrical measurement meter. Backend uses hardcoded data (no database). Frontend uses localStorage for notes. All 10 measurement functions, 9 tools tabs, and protocol features are operational. Service worker has been updated to not pre-cache specific paths which fixed the '[object Object]' error.
mocked_api_note: ALL backend data is MOCKED/hardcoded in server.py - this is by design for this application
